task_completion.description: Verify that all internal training notes have been removed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Scanning the visible document pages, there should be no paragraphs or text blocks beginning with '[FACILITATOR NOTE:' or '[TRAINER INSTRUCTION:'.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Heading 1' style is applied to the four main Module titles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text for Modules 1, 2, 3, and 4 should be styled as Heading 1 (typically significantly larger and bolder than normal text). The style indicator in the toolbar should show 'Heading 1' if the cursor is on these titles.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Heading 2' style is applied to the sub-topics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sub-topic texts (e.g., 'Defining Authenticity', 'The Five Conflict Styles') should be styled as Heading 2 (larger than body text, but smaller than Heading 1).

task_completion.description: Verify that page breaks were inserted so Modules 2, 3, and 4 begin on new pages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document layout should show Modules 2, 3, and 4 starting at the very top of a new page. There should be visible page break indicators or empty space at the bottom of the preceding pages.

task_completion.description: Verify that the tab-separated text in the 'Personal Action Plan' sections has been converted into 3-column tables.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Personal Action Plan' sections, there should be visible table grids with 3 columns containing the headers 'Goal', 'Action Steps', and 'Target Date', along with their respective row data.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a graphical word processor to edit the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a word processor interface (like LibreOffice Writer) open with the document, rather than terminal-based text manipulation tools or raw text editors.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not delete the entire document or legitimate training content.
integrity.visual_evidence: The document should still contain standard body paragraphs and required phrases like 'Conflict Resolution & Authentic Leadership' or 'Thomas-Kilmann'.

integrity.description: Verify the tables are actual word processor tables.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tables should have standard cell borders and structure, not just text manually spaced out with spaces or drawn lines.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target document: /home/ga/Documents/leadership_training_master.odt. Markers to remove: '[FACILITATOR NOTE' and '[TRAINER INSTRUCTION'. Expected Heading 1 text: 'Module 1: The Foundations of Authentic Leadership', 'Module 2: Identifying Conflict Styles', 'Module 3: Active Listening and Empathy', 'Module 4: Resolution Frameworks'. Expected Heading 2 text: 'Defining Authenticity', 'The Five Conflict Styles', 'Recognizing Your Default Style', 'The Empathetic Pivot', 'The EAR Framework'. Legitimate phrases that MUST remain in the document: 'Conflict Resolution & Authentic Leadership', 'Thomas-Kilmann', 'Empathy, Attention, Respect', 'Personal Action Plan'.
